arts.ttl: Worried fans wonder what's wrong with Wayne Rooney
arts.sum: The photo, shared by Sky Sports on X (formerly Twitter), quickly garnered attention from fans, many of whom expressed worry about Rooney's appearance, suggesting he looked "really bad" and older than his years. The 38-year-old, who recently steered Plymouth Argyle to two wins from their last four Championship games, appeared in the stands wearing a black coat, looking visibly tired and unimpressed with United's performance.

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney sparks concern for his health as he's pictured looking 'really bad' while watching Man United's loss to Tottenham at Old Trafford
arts.sum: The United and England legend was spotted in the stands during his former club's 3-0 defeat and looked distinctly unimpressed with their performance.

arts.ttl: 'First and foremost': Burnley boss Scott Parker discusses Maxime Esteve's defensive displays
arts.sum: Scott Parker believes there’s even more to come from Maxime Esteve despite his impressive start to his Burnley career.
